---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new
labels: enhancement
---

**What do you want PortHawk to do that it can't do now?**
<!-- One or two sentences. Be specific — "scan faster" is not a feature request. -->

**Why would this be useful?**
<!-- Who benefits? Red teamers? CI pipelines? Home lab users? -->

**Rough idea for how it could work**
<!-- Optional. CLI flag? New output format? New scan mode? -->

**Alternatives you've considered**
<!-- Did you look at any other tools that do this? -->
